04 — Links

Links — Todd Libby

4

Around the web

A running collection of things I find useful, interesting, or worth coming back to.

Accessibility

  • scottohara.me www.scottohara.me Scott O'Hara's writing on accessibility and ARIA.
  • Inclusive Components inclusive-components.design A pattern library with accessibility baked in, by Heydon Pickering.
  • WebAIM Million Report webaim.org/projects/million/ The annual report on the accessibility of the top 1,000,000 home pages.

AT Protocol

  • AT Protocol Docs atproto.com/docs Official documentation for the AT Protocol powering Bluesky.

Reference

  • MDN Web Docs developer.mozilla.org The canonical reference for HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

Web

  • A List Apart alistapart.com Long-form writing about web design and development.

Total links

6
